title: cordula ciliolaris
intro: Cordula ciliolaris, also known as the heart-leaved cordia, is a tropical plant species belonging to the bignonia family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Cordula ciliolaris include reducing fever, treating wounds, and alleviating respiratory issues such as coughs and colds. Cordula ciliolaris can be prepared into various herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
